name: Succubi's Charm
descrip: Cast a charm on your opponent.
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] stares into [TargetName]'s eyes, and [AttackerName]'s own eyes flash bright pink with a glow of magic, then a tingling sensation of intoxicating affection passes through [TargetName], completely charming [TargetHimOrHer]!
statusMiss: [AttackerName] stares into [TargetName]'s eyes, and [AttackerName]'s own eyes flash bright pink with a glow of magic, but [TargetName] resists the charm gaze from [AttackerYouOrMonsterName].
